chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Next thing we are going to learn is how to pass our string values in Props, how to pass our numbers.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Now let's see how to pass items in a collective group in which major are our arrays.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So if we have to pass an array in a Prop, for example we have to define some features for our product.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: For example, here is a product in which we can pass the price default.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We want some features to be defined in the product tab.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in the product tab, what we can do is, we pass one in the price.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: What can we do? In the product tab, I can create an array called features.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And in the features tab, we can define the features of a product.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: In features tab, we can write that this is a high-tech product.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We can write it as Durable.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We can write it as Fast.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in this way, we have defined the array of three features.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Now if we want to pass this features array, we name our array.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Features is equal to.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And then we send our array to the curly braces.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in the curly braces, we are going to pass on our features array.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We can name this array as options.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And here we can pass the options.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So there won't be any difference in this way.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: But if you want, you can name it the same.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Let's save it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And what we will do here is, first of all, we will try to print by locking the console.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We will try to print our features.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Let's save it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And we will inspect it here.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in the console window, we have an array print.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And in this array, we have a high-tech Durable Fast.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We have all these things available.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So basically, when we pass our array, it will pass in this way.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We will write the name of our array in the curly braces.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And when we try to print it by accessing it in the product.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So now we can make a paragraph.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And in the paragraph, we can print our features array in the curly braces.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We saved it and refreshed it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So what is coming here for now?

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We are doing high-tech Durable Fast.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And one thing you will notice is that generally, if we send anything from a normal HTML page or JavaScript

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: and print it, it doesn't print like this.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Generally, when things are printed, it is printed on our page.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: But there is no comma here.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So what is happening here?

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: When any component is rendered in JSX, then in it, if there is an array in a prop,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: or if there is an object, then what happens?

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: It extracts an individual item and then it is printed.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: That is, the high-tech item that was added in the 0th index in the paragraph,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: then it picks the second item, then it adds it in the paragraph,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: that is, it adds the Durable.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Then it picks the third item, then it adds it in the paragraph.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in this way, when we use our props in JSX and they directly print it in any array,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: then each individual item is picked and each individual item is stick.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So you won't get comma separated values if you print an array directly.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Along with that, we can see something similar in objects.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So for objects, let's say options 2.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We have a in high-tech, b in same values, and c in fast.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Let's save it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So here we can call it features 2 is equal to,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: now when we pass the objects here, then we will write in curly braces this way

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: and we can write the name of our object.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So this is our options 2.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Now to print options 2, we can simply do this.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We will make our next paragraph in which we will print features 2 and here we will write features 2.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: These are very basic examples.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Practically when we use props or other things,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: then there is a little extra layer of complexity.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: But because we are in the beginner stage right now,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: React is our second lecture in which we learn things.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So there is no need to worry about learning some concepts,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: we are taking extra time because we are trying to learn a new thing.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So here we can't render our object directly,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: but we can render the individual key.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: For example, I can access the individual key and render it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We can change our key if we want,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: then we can render the second thing.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So in the case of objects, our individual item is not picked.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Individual item is picked in the case of arrays,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: here we can access the keys.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Now this is the way how we are passing our object.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: We defined it in a different variable and then passed it.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: But here there is another way which you will get to see frequently,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: which is directly passing our features here.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: For example, we will write an array here,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: using square brackets.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: Here we will pass high-tech and let's pass durable.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And we will do it safe and refreshed.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So now we have come to high-tech and durable.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So it is possible to pass an array directly,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: and we can pass an object directly.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And when we pass an object,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: we have to notice that we write another curly braces in the curly braces.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And here we can write A is going to be high-tech.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So basically, in the features,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: this is our syntax, this is our JSX syntax.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: And the things inside it are our complete object.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: So this syntax can look a little different,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: seeing how the second curly braces came in the curly braces.

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: But if we want to pass the object,

chunks.title: Passing Arrays to Props.mp3
chunks.text: we can pass our object directly.
